monsters.name: Drakofido
monsters.condition_immunities: blinded, charmed, deafened, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned

traits.name: Antimagic Susceptibility
traits.desc: Incapacitated while in the area of an <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>antimagic field<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>. If targeted by <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Dispel Magic<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, must succeed on a CON saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.

traits.name: False Appearance
traits.desc: While motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal statue.

traits.name: Magical Construct
traits.desc: Immune to diseases and doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Makes two attacks: one bite and one constrict, or 2 slam attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 +3 piercing damage plus 1d4 +0 fire damage.

actions.name: Constrict
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 1d6 +3 bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the Drakofido can't constrict another target.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d10 +3 bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) slashing damage.

actions.name: Hide
actions.desc: The guard hides as a bonus action if outnumbered.

traits.name: Low Morale
traits.desc: If reduced to 2 HP or less, the guard attempts to flee.

monsters.name: Peritas
monsters.damage_resistances: acid, cold, fire, lightning, thunder; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious
monsters.languages: understands all languages it knew in life but can't speak

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.desc: The specter can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.desc: While in sunlight, the specter has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

actions.name: Life Drain
actions.desc: Melee Spell Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.

traits.name: Immovable
traits.desc: Advantage on saves against being moved

traits.name: Fragile
traits.desc: Takes extra 5 damage from thunder/force damage

traits.name: Stone Form
traits.desc: Resistance to piercing and slashing damage (from weapons)

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: `dice: 1d20+5` to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: `dice: 1d10+3` piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: `dice: 1d20+5` to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: `dice: 1d8+3` slashing damage.

actions.name: Pounce
actions.desc: Can move up to 20 ft. and attack as one action.

monsters.name: Broom of Animated Attack
monsters.condition_immunities: blinded, charmed, deafened, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone
monsters.senses: blindsight 30ft (blind beyond this radius), passive Perception 7

traits.name: Antimagic Susceptibility
traits.desc: The broom is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic, the broom must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for l minute.

traits.name: False Appearance
traits.desc: While the broom remains motionless and isn't flying, it is indistinguishable from a normal broom.

actions.name: Broomstick
actions.desc: Melee, +5 to hit, reach 5 ft, 5 (1d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

reactions.name: Animated Attack
reactions.desc: If the broom is motionless and a creature grabs hold of it, the broom makes a Dexterity check contested by the creature's Strength check. If the broom wins the contest, it flies out of the creature's grasp and makes a melee attack against it with advantage on the attack roll.

monsters.name: Decaying Zoblin
monsters.languages: Understands the languagues it knew in life but can't speak

traits.name: Undead Fortitude
traits.desc: If damage reduces the zoblin to 0 HP, it must make a CON saving throw with a DC of 10 + damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On success, the zoblin drops to 1HP instead

traits.name: Putrid
traits.desc: A creature that touces the zoblin or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 1 necrotic damage

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5ft, one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) slashing damage

monsters.name: Zoblin
monsters.languages: Understands the languagues it knew in life but can't speak

traits.name: Undead Fortitude
traits.desc: If damage reduces the zoblin to 0 HP, it must make a CON saving throw with a DC of 5 + damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On success, the zoblin drops to 1HP instead

actions.name: Vicious Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5ft, one target. Hit: 3 (1d4+1) piercing damage, and the zoblin attaches to the target. While attached, the zoblin doesn't attack. Instead, at the start of each of the zoblin's turns, that creature takes 5 (2d4) necrotic damage. While the zoblin is attached, that creature's movement speed is also reduced by 10ft. A creature may use its action to make a DC 11 Athletics check, prying the zoblin loose on a success.

monsters.name: Zoblin Boss
monsters.languages: Understands the languagues it knew in life but can't speak

traits.name: Undead Fortitude
traits.desc: If damage reduces the zoblin to 0 HP, it must make a CON saving throw with a DC of 5 + damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On success, the zoblin drops to 1HP instead

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5ft, one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) necrotic damage.

reactions.name: Lingering Instincts
reactions.desc: Whenever an enemy within 5ft misses the zoblin with an attack, it can use its reaction to make a scimitar attack against that creature with disadvantage

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc: The necromancer is an 5th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). The necromancer has the following wizard spells prepared: - Cantrips (At Will): <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Chill touch<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>acid splash<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>mage hand<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>prestidigitation<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> - 1st lvl (4 Slots): <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>ray of sickness<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>witch bolt<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, tasha's hideous laughter - 2nd lvl (3 Slots): <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>ray of enfeeblement<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>crown of madness<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK> - 3rd lvl (2 Slots): <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Animate Dead<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>, <STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>Vampiric Touch<STATBLOCK-WIKI-LINK>

actions.name: Quarterstaff
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +1 to hit, reach 5ft, one target. Hit: 2 (1d6-1) bludgeoning damage.

monsters.name: Zombie Warrior
monsters.languages: Understands the languagues it knew in life but can't speak

traits.name: Undead Fortitude
traits.desc: If damage reduces the zoblin to 0 HP, it must make a CON saving throw with a DC of 5 + damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On success, the zoblin drops to 1HP instead

actions.name: Greatsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5ft, one target. Hit: 10 (2d6+3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Spew Bile (recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The zombie  spews bile in a 15ft line. Each creature in that line must make a DC 12 CON save taking 17 (5d6) necrotic damage on failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

monsters.name: Feral Zombie
monsters.languages: Understands the languagues it knew in life but can't speak

traits.name: Undead Fortitude
traits.desc: If damage reduces the zoblin to 0 HP, it must make a CON saving throw with a DC of 5 + damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On success, the zoblin drops to 1HP instead

traits.name: Aggressive
traits.desc: As a bonus action, the zombie can move up to halfits speed toward a hostile creature it can see

actions.name: Ravage
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5ft, one target. Hit: 6 (1d8+2) slashing damage.
